com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid

Class RfidReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.RfidReader

  • public class RfidReader
extends java.lang.Object
    This class encapsulates all tag-related operations. Such as inventory, read, write, lock, etc.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      RfidReader()

    • Constructor Detail

      • RfidReader

        public RfidReader()

    • Method Detail

      • release

        public void release()
        Reset all status and release all callback in RfidReader object.

      • available

        public boolean available()

        Check if the RfidReader object is available.

        The RfidReader object should immediately enter a normal working state after being successfully created by the application. However, we need to consider that the Bluetooth wireless connection may be sometimes accidentally disconnected (although it is not easy to encounter that). After disconnected, SDK will try to reconnect and restore the state of the RfidReader. During this short period of time, the reader is unavailable until the status is restored.

        Returns:
        If the RfidReader is available.

      • syncRead

        public TagReadData[] syncRead(int timeout)
        Inventory in synchronous mode. In this mode, the device will inventory for a period of time that is specified by the 'timeout' parameter, and immediately return the tag data.
        Parameters:
        timeout - Inventory duration in milliseconds.
        Returns:
        Tag data array.

      • syncRead

        public TagReadData[] syncRead(TagAdditionData additionDataType,
                              int timeout)
        Inventory in synchronous mode. In this mode, the device will inventory for a period of time that is specified by the 'timeout' parameter, and immediately return the tag data.
        Parameters:
        additionDataType - Specify tag additional data type.
        timeout - Inventory duration in milliseconds.
        Returns:
        Tag data array.

      • read

        public boolean read(TagReadOption option)
        Inventory in asynchronous mode. After calling this method, the device will start to inventory and continuously return the tag data until the stopRead() method is called.
        Parameters:
        option - Specify which data of the TAG needs to be read.
        Returns:
        If the read operation was performed successfully.

      • read

        public boolean read(TagAdditionData additionDataType,
                    TagReadOption option)
        Inventory in asynchronous mode. After calling this method, the device will start to inventory and continuously return the tag data until the stopRead() method is called.
        Parameters:
        additionDataType - Tag additional data type. Only makes sense when additional data is enabled in the TagReadOption parameter.
        option - Which data of the TAG needs to be read.
        Returns:
        If the read operation was performed successfully.

      • stopRead

        public boolean stopRead()
        Stop asynchronous inventory.
        Returns:
        If the stop operation was performed successfully.

      • setOnTagReadListener

        public void setOnTagReadListener(OnTagReadListener l)
        Setup a tag data listener for asynchronous inventory.
        Parameters:
        l - Tag data listener.

      • removeOnTagReadListener

        public void removeOnTagReadListener(OnTagReadListener l)
        Remove tag data listener of asynchronous inventory.

      • getFreqHopTable

        public int[] getFreqHopTable()
                      throws RfidReaderException
        Get the frequency hopping table in use on the device.
        Returns:
        All of the hopping frequency on the device.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • getEntireFreqHopTable

        public int[] getEntireFreqHopTable(Region r)
        Get the entire frequency hopping table of the specified area.
        Returns:
        All of the available hopping frequency.

      • setFreqHopTable

        public void setFreqHopTable(java.util.List<java.lang.Integer> l)
                     throws RfidReaderException
        Setting a frequency table for hopping.
        Parameters:
        l - The selected frequencies.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • getAntennaPower

        public AntennaPower[] getAntennaPower()
                               throws RfidReaderException
        Get the list of antenna power data, the length of the list equal to the RFID antennas number.
        Returns:
        Antenna power data list.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • setAntennaPower

        public void setAntennaPower(AntennaPower[] aps)
                     throws RfidReaderException
        Setting antenna power.
        Parameters:
        aps - Antenna power data list.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • getRegion

        public Region getRegion()
                 throws RfidReaderException
        Get device region.
        Returns:
        Region id.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • setRegion

        public void setRegion(Region r)
               throws RfidReaderException
        Setting device region.
        Parameters:
        r - Region id.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • setRegion

        public void setRegion(java.lang.String name)
               throws RfidReaderException
        Setting device region.
        Parameters:
        name - Region name.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • getHardwareVersion

        public java.lang.String getHardwareVersion()
                                    throws RfidReaderException
        Get RFID module hardware version.
        Returns:
        Hardware version.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • getSoftwareVersion

        public java.lang.String getSoftwareVersion()
                                    throws RfidReaderException
        Get RFID module software version.
        Returns:
        Software version.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • getTemperature

        public float getTemperature()
                     throws RfidReaderException
        Get RFID module temperature.
        Returns:
        Temperature.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • readTagData

        public java.lang.String readTagData(java.lang.String epc,
                                    int bank,
                                    int startAddr,
                                    int blockNumber,
                                    java.lang.String password)
                             throws RfidReaderException
        Read the specify data from one tag.
        Parameters:
        epc - Tag EPC, used to identify a tag.
        bank - Data bank to read.
        startAddr - Start address to read.
        blockNumber - Block number to read.
        password - Password of the tag.
        Returns:
        Hex string of the read data.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • writeTagData

        public void writeTagData(java.lang.String epc,
                         int bank,
                         int startAddr,
                         java.lang.String password,
                         java.lang.String data)
                  throws RfidReaderException
        Write data to one tag.
        Parameters:
        epc - Tag EPC, used to identify a tag.
        bank - Data bank to write.
        startAddr - Start address to write.
        password - Password of the tag.
        data - Hex string of the data to be write.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • getSession

        public Gen2.Session getSession()
                        throws RfidReaderException
        Get session mode for the Gen-2 compliant tag.
        Returns:
        Session property in the device.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • setSession

        public void setSession(Gen2.Session s)
                throws RfidReaderException
        Set session mode for the Gen-2 compliant tag.
        Parameters:
        s - Session property to be set.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • lockTag

        public void lockTag(java.lang.String epc,
                    Gen2.LockBank bank,
                    Gen2.LockType type,
                    java.lang.String password)
             throws RfidReaderException
        Lock a tag.
        Parameters:
        epc - Tag EPC, used to identify a tag.
        bank - Data bank to read.
        type - Lock type.
        password - Password of the tag.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

      • killTag

        public void killTag(java.lang.String epc,
                    java.lang.String password)
             throws RfidReaderException
        Kill a tag.
        Parameters:
        epc - Tag EPC, used to identify a tag.
        password - Password of the tag.
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException

               throws RfidReaderException
        Throws:
        RfidReaderException
